name: lossless-audio-relay
description: Cross-platform lossless realtime audio relay for NATed clients.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @lossless-audio/protocol && npm run build -w @lossless-audio/server && npm run build -w @lossless-audio/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -ws --if-present && npm run test:sonobus-relay-state
